code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut total = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut val = 0

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    end
    val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    in_num = true
    sign = -1
    val = 0
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    in_num = true
    sign = 1
    val = 0
  else
    if in_num
      let num = sign * val
      if num > 0
        total = total + num * 2
      end
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let num = sign * val
  if num > 0
    total = total + num * 2
  end
end

println("result=#{total}")
